Comfrt: Hey! My name is Samantha, I noticed you checking out our website. I wanted to let you know that we are very low on stock for most items and are running our biggest sale EVER. 

Now would be the absolute best time to grab a set from us! 

 https://comfrt.attn.tv/auOUtunVYR58 .
I actually am waiting for return information to exchange a Christmas present for different size

Comfrt: I'm happy to help.
You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/adtkVmJONW9B

We offer exchanges for store credit only. In order to qualify for an even exchange all items must be approved/requested within 30 days of delivery. Unfortunately, anything after the 30 day window period can not be approved. All exchanges must be in exact condition with no signs of wear and tear, stains or other signs of usage; including in the original poly bag with SKU to return in.
I understand but I received this as a gift from my aunt.  Seems wrong that I can't exchange it for a different size   I just received it on New Year's Day when we celebrated Christmas.
I had contacted someone and they said someone would contact me but haven't heard anything
Comfrt: I understand your concern. Can you please confirm that you sent an email to this address? info@comfrt.com
Actually I just received this this morning I hadn't looked but I can't find a return label
Comfrt: I'm really sorry for the trouble! Did you send me a picture? Can you try sending it again? It doesn't seem to open up on my end. Happy to help.
I found the return label just now.  It says for me to pack it up but how do I request the exchange for different size
Should I just put a note in it
I'm sorry to bother you.
Template used: "Do you offer exchanges?"; last updated: 2026-02-12 19:38:17.598

Comfrt: Good question and no worries! Please note that we offer exchanges for store credit only. In order to qualify for an even exchange all items must be approved/requested within 30 days of delivery. Unfortunately, anything after the 30 day window period can not be approved. All exchanges must be in exact condition with no signs of wear and tear, stains or other signs of usage; including in the original poly bag with SKU to return in. I hope this clarifies and please let me know if you have further questions, I'm here to help!
